pages.title: Impostor among us: Escape from prison
pages.description:
Sneak through prison corridors and complete secret tasks in a multiplayer social deduction setting where identifying impostors is key. Utilize stealth mechanics and observation to survive undetected while navigating tight spaces. The challenge ramps up as trust shifts and players work together or betray each other in a confined prison environment.

Key Features

• Multiplayer social deduction gameplay  
• Stealth movement and hiding spots  
• Task completion under suspicion  
• Dynamic player trust system  
• Prison-themed level design

pages.title: Among Us Smash
pages.description:
Smash and eliminate impostors using quick reflexes and strategic timing in this multiplayer action twist within the space-themed setting. Players must react fast to identify targets as the chaos of an ever-changing arena tests their precision and decision-making. Secondary modes add varied challenges and increase the stakes in this unique social deduction spin.

Key Features

• Impostor targeting mechanics  
• Reflex-based combat controls  
• Increasing difficulty waves  
• Multiple game modes available  
• Space-themed arena environments
